text:
Created attachment 238577
shell archive

Djot is a light markup syntax. It derives most of its features from commonmark,
but it fixes a few things that make commonmark's syntax complex and difficult
to parse efficiently. It is also much fuller-featured than commonmark, with
support for definition lists, footnotes, tables, several new kinds of inline
formatting (insert, delete, highlight, superscript, subscript), math, smart
punctuation, attributes that can be applied to any element, and generic
containers for block-level, inline-level, and raw content.

WWW: https://djot.net
